title: Implement Phase 0 Handoff Pipeline per spec. Read these files first: 1. ~/.claude/cache/dev-spec-phase0-handoff-pipeline.md (v2.0 spec - MUST READ FIRST) 2. ~/.claude/cache/handoff-phase0-codex.md (handoff document) 3. ~/.claude/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs (target...
summary_text: Implemented on `feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` in commit `1c8023c7`. Changes: - [delegate.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js#L192) now accepts `--delegation-context-file`, updates usage text, and [collectAutoContext()](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js#L385) now prefers that file over the legacy fixed path while rejecting stale context on `run_id` mismatch. - [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L289) now writes per-lane delegation context files under `~/.claude/cache/delegation-context/{runId}--{agent}.md`, redacts task text with the existing `redactSecrets`, enforces the 2048-byte cap with `Buffer.byteLength`, and writes atomically via `.{pid}.{timestamp}.tmp`. - [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L327) now injects `--auto-context` and `--delegation-context-file` only for `codex` and `codex-spark`, leaving ACPX and other providers untouched. Validation: - `node --check /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js` - `node --check /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` - `git diff --check -- assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate.js assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` Push did not complete: `git push -u origin feature/phase0-handoff-pipeline` failed in this environment because `github.com` could not be resolved. Unrelated pre-existing dirty files remain in the worktree and were not included in the commit. One spec mismatch in the repo: `lib/redact.js` does not exist here, so I used the existing `redactSecrets` already provided by [output-filter.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/output-filter.js).
